description: A screenshot of an online news article. At the top is a bold black serif headline 'Child predator freed by NYC cops captured in New Jersey sanctuary city Newark by ICE after release' with a byline 'By Phil Stilton / August 26, 2025'. Below the headline is an embedded color photograph showing two law-enforcement officers in plainclothes with tactical vests labeled 'POLICE' (one also 'FEDERAL OFFICER') escorting and handcuffing a heavyset man in a gray Champion hoodie and dark pants, viewed from behind in an alley near a door marked 'RESTRICTED AREA / AUTHORIZED PERSONNEL ONLY'. The officers' and subject's faces are not clearly shown. Beneath the photo is article body text: 'NEWARK, NJ - A Dominican national accused of sexually abusing a child under 11 was arrested in New Jersey last week by federal immigration officers after the NYPD released him without notifying ICE, citing sanctuary city policies. Robert Reid Mendez Jimenez, who is subject to a final deportation order from 2018, was taken into custody on Tuesday by ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations (ERO) Newark officers after a targeted operation to locate him in the community. He had been arrested earlier by the NYPD on multiple child predatory offenses but was released when New York City officials declined to honor an immigration detainer request.' This is a captured third-party news webpage. The arrest photo within it has minimal design styling.
notable_text: Child predator freed by NYC cops captured in New Jersey sanctuary city Newark by ICE after release; By Phil Stilton / August 26, 2025; vest text 'POLICE' / 'FEDERAL OFFICER'
